title: ARC 1: DEAD RECKONING
subtitle: The universe doesn't care if you live or die. That's the good news.

active_mission.title: Salvage Operation: MSV Carrion Star
active_mission.objective: Recover the sealed container, nav core, and personal effects crate while preventing Hollow entities from boarding the Leviathan.

intel_warning: Hollow entities remain active aboard the Carrion Star. Cole confirms the sealed container is chained in cargo bay midships, starboard stack. Drone Eye-1 is presumed lost after synchronized hostile response.

progression.title: Carrion Star job accepted
progression.summary: Crew accepted Mira Vex's salvage contract on the MSV Carrion Star after confirming job details were intentionally incomplete.

progression.title: Negotiation with Mira Vex
progression.summary: Draven forced terms from 50k to 100k and secured a full resupply package before launch.

progression.title: Defensive resupply completed
progression.summary: Medical stores, breach kits, signal jammer, PDW for Echo, survey drone, and thermal breaching tape were loaded at Station Nowhere.

progression.title: Approach to target
progression.summary: Leviathan completed fold transit and approached Carrion Star running dark and adrift.

progression.title: Boarding action
progression.summary: Crew boarded via port docking collar and encountered synchronized biosign behavior inconsistent with normal survivors.

progression.title: First Hollow contact
progression.summary: Captain Renner and linked crew displayed coordinated behavior, demanded passage, and confirmed hostile anomaly profile.

progression.title: Jace Cole extracted
progression.summary: D-Volt severed Cole from the network using System Hijack; crew withdrew with Cole aboard Leviathan.

progression.title: Survey drone lost
progression.summary: Eye-1 recon feed cut to static after entities turned in unison toward the drone. Asset presumed destroyed or captured.
